zh.lifeSummary: 當Deliverance Packard於1652年7月11日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可辛加姆時，她的父親Samuel Packard11649歲，母親Elizabeth Stream38歲。她於大約1680年與Thomas Washburn在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布利其沃特結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1708年7月28日之前在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯布洛可頓，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Deliverance Packard于1652年7月11日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可辛加姆时，她的父亲Samuel Packard11649岁，母亲Elizabeth Stream38岁。她于大约1680年与Thomas Washburn在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布利其沃特结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1708年7月28日之前在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯布洛可頓，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Packard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English pak(e) ‘pack, bundle’ + the Anglo-Norman French pejorative suffix -ard, probably a derogatory occupational name for a peddler.
English: pejorative derivative of the Middle English personal name   Pack  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Packert, Päckert, from ancient Germanic personal names formed with a word meaning ‘battle’ or ‘to fight’; or a variant of Packer 2 (with excrescent -t).

variants.name: Pack
meanings: English (Kent and Devon): variant of Pask , derived from Middle English Pake ‘Easter, Passover’.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational name for a wholesale trader, from Middle Low German packe, German Pack ‘bundle, package’ (see Packer ). Compare Pak .
Dutch: variant, archaic or Americanized, of   Pak  , a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Deliverance
meanings: Irish: Liberation or deliverance; deliverance of the Lord.

en.lifeSummary: When Deliverance Packard was born on 11 July 1652, in Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Samuel Packard, was 11649 and her mother, Elizabeth Stream, was 38. She married Thomas Washburn about 1680, in Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 8 daughters. She died before 28 July 1708, in Brockton, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States, and was buried in Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Deliverance Packard est née le 11 juillet 1652, à Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Samuel Packard, avait 11649 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stream, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Washburn environ 1680, à Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée avant 28 juillet 1708, à Brockton, Plymouth, Massachusetts, États-Unis, et a été enterrée à Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Deliverance Packard am 11. Juli 1652 in Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Samuel Packard 11649 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Stream 38. Sie hat um 1680 in Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America Thomas Washburn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb vor 28. Juli 1708 in Brockton, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Deliverance Packard è nata il il 11 luglio 1652 nel Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Samuel Packard, aveva 11649 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Stream, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Washburn circa 1680, nel Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 8 figlie. Morì prima del 28 luglio 1708, nel Brockton, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, e fu sepolta a Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Deliverance Packardが1652年7月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクヒンガムで生まれた時，父Samuel Packardは11649歳，母Elizabeth Streamは38歳であった。約1680年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーブリジェワターでThomas Washburnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1708年7月28日以前にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州プリモウスブロクトンで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.Bridgwater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스
ko.lifeSummary: Deliverance Packard(이)가 1652년 7월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Samuel Packard(은)는 11649세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Stream(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 대략 1680년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리지왓어에서 Thomas Washburn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1708년 7월 28일 이전 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스 브록턴에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Deliverance Packard nasceu em 11 de julho de 1652, em Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Samuel Packard, tinha 11649 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stream, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Washburn aproximadamente 1680, em Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 28 de julho de 1708, em Brockton, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, e foi sepultada em Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Deliverance Packard родилась 11 июля 1652 г. в местности хингхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Samuel Packard было 11649 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stream, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Washburn около 1680 г. в местности бриджюэитир, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла перед 28 июля 1708 г. в местности брокктон, плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты и была похоронена в местности плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

Se casó con Thomas Washburn aproximadamente 1680, en Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 8 hijas.
